items.definition_en: Bread is a common food made from flour and water.
items.example_en: She ate a slice of bread with butter.

items.definition_en: Rice is a small white or brown grain used in many meals.
items.example_en: We had rice and vegetables for lunch.

items.definition_en: Pasta is a food made from flour and water in many shapes.
items.example_en: He cooked pasta for dinner.

items.definition_en: Oats are small grains used to make porridge.
items.example_en: She likes oats for breakfast.

items.definition_en: Cornflakes are thin crispy breakfast cereal made from corn.
items.example_en: He eats cornflakes every morning.

items.definition_en: Barley is a grain used in soups and bread.
items.example_en: Barley is often used in healthy salads.

items.definition_en: Wheat is a plant used to make flour and bread.
items.example_en: Bread is usually made from wheat.

items.definition_en: Cereal is a breakfast food made from grains.
items.example_en: He pours milk over his cereal.

items.definition_en: Popcorn is a light snack made from heated corn.
items.example_en: We had popcorn at the movie.

items.definition_en: Quinoa is a small round grain often used in salads.
items.example_en: They cooked quinoa for dinner.

items.definition_en: Muesli is a mix of cereals, nuts and dried fruit.
items.example_en: She likes muesli with yogurt.

items.definition_en: A bun is a small round bread.
items.example_en: He eats a bun for breakfast.

items.definition_en: A loaf is a large piece of bread.
items.example_en: She bought a loaf of bread.

items.definition_en: Porridge is a hot breakfast dish made from oats.
items.example_en: She eats porridge every morning.

items.definition_en: A cracker is a thin, crisp snack made from grains.
items.example_en: He had some cheese and a cracker.

items.definition_en: A bagel is a round bread with a hole in the middle.
items.example_en: She likes her bagel toasted.

items.definition_en: A tortilla is a flat bread made from wheat or corn.
items.example_en: We put cheese in the tortilla.

items.definition_en: A roll is a small piece of bread.
items.example_en: He ate a roll with soup.

items.definition_en: A grain is a small hard seed from plants like wheat.
items.example_en: Grain is used to make bread and pasta.

items.definition_en: Pita bread is flat bread with a pocket inside.
items.example_en: They filled the pita bread with salad.
